meaning: adj.<苏格兰>好的,第一流的,大的,令人喜爱的
examples: Be careful about which fonts you use because the wrong one makes you look like a proper wally.
The remarkable photograph of a 'moonbow' was taken by Wally Pacholka as he looked over the Haleakala crater on Maui Island in Hawaii.
Myles Mack returns from last year's starting five along with big man Wally Judge.
Given the arms-race mentality of youth sports today, Wally Uihlein said there is no other choice.
